nodes.name: Update Automation Status: DocuSign follow up email sent

parameters.sendTo: ={{ $('Set fields from leads: DocuSign received').item.json['Email Address'] }}
parameters.subject: =Reminder: Documents Needed to Complete Our Review
parameters.message:
= Reminder: Documents Needed to Complete OUR Review

QUICK & EASY APPROVALS. STRAIGHTFORWARD PROCESS.

Hello,

We’re following up regarding your application.

CMCA works well with your industry. We already work with businesses like yours and we're ready to move forward once we have everything we need.

We have received your DocuSign submission, but we have not yet received your business bank statements, which are required to complete our review.

COMPLETE YOUR APPLICATION

Final Step

To complete our underwriting review, we require your business bank statements for the previous 2–3 months. Once we receive your statements, our underwriting team will finalize the assessment and prepare the financing options available to you.

If you’d like to discuss next steps or have questions, you may also schedule a call with us. Please let us know the best phone number to reach you and a convenient time for a brief call. We’re here to make this process clear, secure, and efficient: underwriting@cmcafinance.com.

CMCA is committed to responsible, secure, and transparent lending.

We are accredited by the Better Business Bureau

Proud member of the Canadian Lender Association

Note: If you prefer to complete a PDF version of the application instead, simply reply to this email to request the form. Docusign is the preferred method.

CMCA – Canadian Merchant Cash Advance
Underwriting & Client Services

CMCA Finance® Corporate Office
309 Lakeshore Blvd. Pointe-Claire, QC H9S 4L6
Phone: 1-855-651-2844
Fax: 1-855-541-6893
www.canadianmerchantcashadvance.ca   underwriting@cmcafinance.com

parameters.sendTo: ={{ $('Set fields from leads: DocuSign email sent').item.json['Email Address'] }}
parameters.subject: =Reminder: CMCA Application Received – Action Required
parameters.message:
= Documents Needed to Complete OUR Review

QUICK & EASY APPROVALS. STRAIGHTFORWARD PROCESS.

Hello,

Yesterday we sent you a secure DocuSign link to complete your CMCA Financial Services application. We have not yet received your completed form.

To continue with your financing request, please take a few minutes to finalize your application online:

COMPLETE YOUR APPLICATION

No printing or scanning required.

COMPLETE APPLICATION

Once your information is received, our underwriting team will review your file and contact you with the financing options available.

Your information is encrypted and processed securely.

If you have any questions while completing your application, our team is here to help—simply reply to this email or call us at 1-855-651-2844.

CMCA is committed to responsible, secure, and transparent lending.

We are accredited by the Better Business Bureau

Proud member of the Canadian Lender Association

Note: If you prefer to complete a PDF version of the application instead, simply reply to this email to request the form. Docusign is the preferred method.

CMCA – Canadian Merchant Cash Advance
Underwriting & Client Services

309 Lakeshore Blvd. Pointe-Claire, QC H9S 4L6
Phone: 1-855-651-2844
